Hi there. A few updates lol.

Jun 19, 2024

Phew. It’s been what… around 12 days since I last posted?

I’ve been busy with finals and work. But I think I’m going to be more active here now. There’s been a few topics that I wanna explore and write about in the 12 months I have left in my co-op, after which I go back to uni.


Some ideas including but not limited to:

  • Continuing with the Go book.
  • Learning how to write stock pitches like some you see in here
  • Writing about Ansible and Docker because I might be using them at work.
  • I am also reading Crafting Interpreters, so I might write about that.
  • Reviewing the RISC-V book I bought which was used for CMPUT 229. [I wanna do good in this field. Even tho I fucked up the course lmaooo.]


lets have some fun :))


Manav.
